reviews.comment: We had Richard come in to perform headshots for the business. It was a very busy day. But, he took the time with each person to make sure he got the right shot. I saw mine yesterday. Literally, the best picture I have ever seen of me. I sent it to my mom and she said "oh wow, that's you?" So good my own mom didn't recognize me. Thanks for everything Richard.

reviewReply.comment: Eric, Thanks so much for your incredibly kind words! I am thrilled to hear that you love your image.  It was a pleasure meeting and working with you!
